title: 11/25/19 Google Earthing Baths of Diocletian Region 6 Rome

transcript.text: Hi, Living in Boulder, V-Log, November 26th, 2019, Tuesday, 2.59 a.m.
So this is, oh, but this is the video for November 25th,
Because the last time I did one was November 24th.
I didn't get around to do the video because I slept all day yesterday.
I was up until like 10 in the morning working,
And then I slept until it got dark, which was like 5 or something.
And then I started working, and I kind of started feeling like I was behind.
And I'm less likely to do a video that day when I feel like I didn't do anything that day.
I'm kind of getting bogged down on the Baths of Diocletian,
Because before I build the Baths of Diocletian,
I want to make sure that it's built perfectly.
I got the other day, I was trying to build the Baths of Diocletian,
And I already built like half the pillars and half the structure.
I must have spent a lot of time on it,
But then the image I used to trace it off of was missing magically.
So I had to retrace it, and then I decided to do it differently.
Before, I put the image traced directly on top of the image in the map,
Which was off by a little bit, you know,
Because they're putting the entire city in one map.
You can't have every single building centered perfectly.
I think he centered it on the Coliseum.
I think that was the one building that was centered perfectly,
But everything else was pretty close.
So it was off a little bit, and the one on the map, or the real map,
The real one was actually on top of the road.
So before I had it on the map, but now I have the real one,
So that when you click on and off of the model,
It actually is directly on top of the real buildings throughout the entire one.
And so I think it's better that way.
It means I have to fix the road, but it won't be that complicated
Because I didn't build any of the buildings on top of the road yet.
So I'll just build that.
So I was spending all of my time just watching all of the lectures I could see about it,
Looking at all the images I could see about it,
The plans, watching all of the videos.
Right now I'm watching an hour-long video of a guy,
And he only uploaded the video on the 14th.
He uploaded the video, yeah, the 14th, like one week ago,
A week and a half ago.
So it's an hour-long tour of the Bows of Diocletian,
And he's showing everything inside.
So I'm getting a picture of exactly how it looks.
I want to make it as accurate as possible and take my time with it.
It was taking me forever also because I traced off the map, the main map,
But it only shows half of like three-quarters or something of the actual stands.
And I had to figure out a way to incorporate the map in with the map that I have
That I superimposed it because the map on the main map
Is a lot more detailed, and it shows how many stands there are.
And I first traced it off of the map that I put on,
And then I realized that wasn't how I wanted it to do.
So I deleted all my stands that I made and the structure,
And then I built the map again on top of the map.
But then I had to finish it, kind of like the same way with the Lake of Augustus.
I'm super bummed I lost that.
I lost my Lake of Augustus because I already built it,
And it took forever because it only showed like three-quarters of it on the map,
So I had to figure out a way to make it, to complete the oval.
And when you complete circles and ovals and squares and like that,
If you want to make it look perfect so that you can't tell from a distance,
It takes a long time because you have to do it mathematically with numbers
And make it perfectly.
That's why it took me a long time today.
But I finished with that, and now I'm watching the tour,
And then I'll put in exactly where the pools are tomorrow, and then I'll finish.
I made a mistake and looked at the one that wasn't, the map that wasn't detailed
And didn't like pay attention enough that there's different sizes of pillars.
So all the pillars I have are the same size, but that's the only place I kind of slacked.
But so I'm going to watch this guy, find out where all the pools are,
And then build it up.
It's interesting, there's a few different versions.
The woman at Yale was doing, one of her lectures was only on the Bath of Diocletian,
And she showed two different maps.
So, you know, there's conflicting ideas of, well, exactly about what everything looked like.
But it's the one building that is, like, preserved.
The whole building has kind of got converted into modern-day buildings,
But they still use some of the baths now, and the inside is the same,
With the pillars original and the mosaic original.
Inside the actual swimming pool, it has the original marble, too, down there.
So I'm looking forward to that.
Or, yeah, looking forward to watching the rest of this guy's videos,
See what else he has.
So, oh, just getting bogged down.
Maybe I can finish the baths tomorrow, but it's really not that big of a deal.
It's the biggest baths ever built, so it's, like, take your time with it in Rome.
I think it ever built.
So, yeah, hopefully I can finish tomorrow and then do other buildings tomorrow.
Maybe finish the whole region, I don't know.
I haven't really been listening to anything, just focus,
Even though I've just been doing a lot of tracing, just the Trump stuff.
I listened to Trump's interview, a 54-minute-long interview with Fox & Friends the other day,
And he just keeps getting more and more senile.
It's an annoying people off, people more and more.
It was kind of sad because at the end he's like,
He's like, it's good that I'm talking to you guys.
You're the only people I talk to.
You're the only way I can get the truth out to the world.
So he's just losing power.
It's something that's happened a bunch of times in history where you get a crazy person's power
And their power just erodes.
Like, nobody can, and then at the end they turn around and, like,
They give somebody an order and they don't even have power to do anything.
So maybe that's what will happen to Trump before he's even impeached.
But anyway, I hope he gets impeached and kicked out.
If he doesn't, that adds a whole other layer to the surreal nightmare.
Because now it's like the demon has infested the minds of the other people
And it's not contained in just Trump.
I was telling my mom today, we were talking about it,
And I would go, yeah, this is what happened.
Like, we were talking about Devin Nunes, and we're like, yeah, that's what happens.
This is the bearing fruit of our faulty educational system.
Nobody's getting educated, and now we've got people in government
Who don't know anything.
So that's why I'm motivated to set up a system where people,
There's like a point system, and you can get yourself to a certain level in society
Based on how many ideas you've spread about yourself
And how many, like, books you've talked about.
Anyway, and your bi-weekly history test results, which are on my website.
I'll try to explain that later.
So, yeah, that's all I'm doing today.
Anyway, tomorrow, yeah, hopefully I can finish the Baz of Diocletian.
It's Region 6.
I think I'll put the link below, so if you click on the link
And then you look for Region 6, that's what I'm working on now.
Yep, that's it.
Talk to you tomorrow.
Hopefully I'll be done with Baz of Diocletian tomorrow.
Have a good one.
Thank you.
